journey.name: Recording Studio
journey.description: Verify that the user can record video using the front-facing camera while following the teleprompter.

actions.action: If the screen does not say "Recording Studio" click on the Writer's Studio button and then the Record button.
Ensure that the top half of the screen displays the previously saved script.
Check that the bottom half of the screen shows the live front-facing camera view.
Wait for the 5-second countdown to finish.
Verify that the teleprompter advances correctly based on the target duration timestamps.
Check that two counters exist counting down the remaining time for the current caption and the entire video.
When recording completes, verify that navigation option 'Edit' appears.
Tap 'Edit' to advance to the next screen.
Verify that the screen title is now "Editing Studio".
